summary: Russian forces destroyed enemy unmanned boats using FPV drones near Tendrovskaya Spit and the Dnieper River mouth. Ukraine is fielding the HX-2 AI-powered loitering munition, with 6,000 delivered and production ramping to over 1,000 per month. The "Rubicon" Center reported 132 enemy targets destroyed on March 13, 2026, including fixed-wing UAVs, while "Yolka" air defense drones conducted kinetic intercepts of Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs in spring 2026. Ukrainian FPV pilots are using tactics like throwing riders from horses before striking, and Russian infantry have engaged in direct duels with FPV drones, with at least one soldier charging a drone with a bayonet and being destroyed.
